title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 25.5%.

items.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: The Cabinet Office kept no substantive report about the theft of Morgan McSweeney’s phone last year, nor of a report into allegations of bullying by Anotina Romeo, the cabinet secretary.
